label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library seeder — aggressive per-batch cuts so a 100-plant manual run actually finishes. Halved batch size (20 → 10), shrunk avoid list (1500 → 800), and switched the Gemini cascade to fail-fast (max 1 retry per model, 20s timeout) so a single overloaded Gemini call can't eat the whole background-task budget. Worst-case batch time drops from a couple of minutes to ~12 seconds.
